headline: Progressive Reports February 2026 Results
summary: MAYFIELD VILLAGE, OHIO, March 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Progressive Corporation (NYSE:PGR) today reported the following results for the month ended February 28, 2026: February(millions, except per share amounts and ratios; unaudited) 2026 2025 ChangeNet premiums written$6,995 $6,684 5 %Net premiums earned$6,528 $6,036 8 %Net income$943 $928 2 %Per share available to common shareholders$1.61 $1.58 2 %Total pretax net realized gains (losses) on securities$(5) $(110) (95)%Combined ratio 85.7
